summary: React responsive header component with 3-level navigation menu, styled with Tailwind CSS, including hamburger menu for mobile.
architectural_notes: Use React + Tailwind CSS for responsive header and navigation
3-level menu: main nav > sub-menu > sub-sub-menu with dropdown/flyout behavior
Mobile: hamburger menu toggle; Desktop: hover/click dropdowns

existing_features.title: Create a full-width responsive header component that spans 100% of the viewport width at all breakpoints (mobile, tablet, desktop), with appropriate padding and a consistent height.

Implement a 3-level navigation menu in the header for desktop views. Level 1 items appear as top-level links in the horizontal nav bar. Hovering a Level 1 item reveals a Level 2 dropdown. Hovering a Level 2 item reveals a Level 3 flyout or nested sub-menu. Use sample/demo menu data to populate all three levels.

On mobile and tablet breakpoints, collapse the 3-level navigation into a hamburger menu icon. Tapping the icon opens a full-width drawer or accordion-style vertical menu. Each level should be expandable/collapsible via tap, showing all three menu levels inline.

Apply a creative, coherent visual theme to the header and navigation menus. Use a bold, modern design with strong typography, a rich dark or jewel-toned color palette (not blue or purple), clear hover/active states, smooth CSS transitions on dropdowns, and consistent spacing throughout.

new_feature_requests.summary: Responsive header with 3-level navigation menu (desktop dropdowns + mobile hamburger menu)
